# Support

This repository is for `nuitka-stubgen`, a deterministic stub generator used by Nuitka.

## Where To Get Help

- Bug reports: open a GitHub issue with a minimal reproduction and expected vs. actual output.
- Questions / proposals: open a GitHub discussion (if enabled). Otherwise, open an issue describing
  the motivating use case and constraints.

## What To Include

- Python version and OS
- A minimal input (or a new fixture under `tests/fixtures/cases/`)
- The exact command you ran
- The generated output (or failing assertion output)
